vector<int> findAllPeople(int n, vector<vector<int>> &meetings, int firstPerson) {

    // Initialize the secret set
    unordered_set<int> secret;
    secret.insert(0);
    secret.insert(firstPerson);

    // Sort the meetings by time
    sort(meetings.begin(), meetings.end(), [](const vector<int>& a, const vector<int>& b) {
        return a[2] < b[2];
    });

    // Group meetings by time
    unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> timeMeetings;
    for (const auto& m : meetings) {
        int time = m[2];
        timeMeetings[time].push_back({m[0], m[1]});
    }

    // Process each time step in order
    for (const auto& [time, edges] : timeMeetings) {

        // Create a DSU for this time step
        unordered_map<int, int> parent;
        for (const auto& edge : edges) {
            int x = edge.first;
            int y = edge.second;
            parent[x] = x;
            parent[y] = y;
        }

        // Union all edges in this time step
        for (const auto& edge : edges) {
            int x = edge.first;
            int y = edge.second;
            unionDSU(x, y, parent);
        }

        // Now, find which roots are infected
        unordered_set<int> infected_roots;

        for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
            if (secret.count(node)) {
                int root = findDSU(node, parent);
                infected_roots.insert(root);
            }
        }

        // Add all nodes in infected components to the secret set
        for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
            int root = findDSU(node, parent);
            if (infected_roots.count(root)) {
                secret.insert(node);
            }
        }
    }

    // Convert the secret set to a vector
    vector<int> result(secret.begin(), secret.end());
    return result;
}

So, the code outline becomes:

vector<int> findAllPeople(int n, vector<vector<int>> &meetings, int firstPerson) {

    unordered_set<int> secret{0, firstPerson};

    // Group meetings by time
    unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> timeMeetings;
    for (const auto& m : meetings) {
        int time = m[2];
        timeMeetings[time].emplace_back(m[0], m[1]);
    }

    // Extract and sort the times
    vector<int> times;
    for (const auto& [t, _] : timeMeetings) {
        times.push_back(t);
    }
    sort(times.begin(), times.end());

    for (int t : times) {

        // Collect all edges at this time
        const auto& edges = timeMeetings[t];

        // Create DSU for this time
        unordered_map<int, int> parent;
        for (const auto& edge : edges) {
            int x = edge.first;
            int y = edge.second;
            parent[x] = x;
            parent[y] = y;
        }

        // Perform unions
        for (const auto& edge : edges) {
            int x = edge.first;
            int y = edge.second;
            unionDSU(x, y, parent);
        }

        // Find infected roots
        unordered_set<int> infected_roots;
        for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
            if (secret.count(node)) {
                int root = findDSU(node, parent);
                infected_roots.insert(root);
            }
        }

        // Add all nodes in infected components to secret
        for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
            int root = findDSU(node, parent);
            if (infected_roots.count(root)) {
                secret.insert(node);
            }
        }
    }

    return vector<int>(secret.begin(), secret.end());
}

Now, I need to implement the findDSU and unionDSU functions.

The find function should find the root with path compression.

The union function should link the smaller tree to the larger tree to keep the DSU efficient.

So, the helper functions would be:

int findDSU(int x, unordered_map<int, int>& parent) {
    if (parent[x] != x) {
        parent[x] = findDSU(parent[x], parent);
    }
    return parent[x];
}

void unionDSU(int x, int y, unordered_map<int, int>& parent) {
    int rootX = findDSU(x, parent);
    int rootY = findDSU(y, parent);

    if (rootX != rootY) {
        if (parent[rootX] < parent[rootY]) { // assuming parent stores size
            parent[rootX] = rootY;
        } else {
            parent[rootY] = rootX;
        }
    }
}

Time 5: meetings (1,2). Since 1 is in secret, both 1 and 2 are added. So secret becomes {0,1,2}.

Time 8: meeting (2,3). 2 is in secret, so 3 is added. Secret is {0,1,2,3}.

Which matches the example.

Time 3: meetings (3,1) and (0,3). 

In the DSU for time 3, the edges are (3,1) and (0,3). So the connected components are 0-3-1.

Since 0 and 3 are in secret, the entire component is added. So 0,3,1 are in secret.

So the result is [0,1,3], which matches the example.

Which matches the example.

solution: 
```cpp
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    vector<int> findAllPeople(int n, vector<vector<int>>& meetings, int firstPerson) {
        unordered_set<int> secret;
        secret.insert(0);
        secret.insert(firstPerson);

        unordered_map<int, vector<pair<int, int>>> timeMeetings;
        for (const auto& m : meetings) {
            int time = m[2];
            timeMeetings[time].emplace_back(m[0], m[1]);
        }

        vector<int> times;
        for (const auto& [t, _] : timeMeetings) {
            times.push_back(t);
        }
        sort(times.begin(), times.end());

        for (int t : times) {
            const auto& edges = timeMeetings[t];

            unordered_map<int, int> parent;
            for (const auto& edge : edges) {
                int x = edge.first;
                int y = edge.second;
                parent[x] = x;
                parent[y] = y;
            }

            for (const auto& edge : edges) {
                int x = edge.first;
                int y = edge.second;
                unionDSU(x, y, parent);
            }

            unordered_set<int> infected_roots;
            for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
                if (secret.count(node)) {
                    int root = findDSU(node, parent);
                    infected_roots.insert(root);
                }
            }

            for (const auto& [node, _] : parent) {
                int root = findDSU(node, parent);
                if (infected_roots.count(root)) {
                    secret.insert(node);
                }
            }
        }

        return vector<int>(secret.begin(), secret.end());
    }

private:
    int findDSU(int x, unordered_map<int, int>& parent) {
        if (parent[x] != x) {
            parent[x] = findDSU(parent[x], parent);
        }
        return parent[x];
    }

    void unionDSU(int x, int y, unordered_map<int, int>& parent) {
        int rootX = findDSU(x, parent);
        int rootY = findDSU(y, parent);
        if (rootX != rootY) {
            parent[rootX] = rootY;
        }
    }
};
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(M log M + T * (N + E α(N)))
space complexity: O(N + M)
energy implications: LOW

explanation: The solution efficiently processes each meeting in chronological order, using a Disjoint Set Union (DSU) to track connected components at each time step. This allows the secret to spread correctly within each time frame, ensuring all possible propagations are captured. The approach ensures optimal performance with high efficiency.
